description: Enforcement mode: Policy setting `capabilities.enforcement: "log" | "block"`. Log mode (default): violations recorded but don't block. Block mode: violation fails the step with `capability_violation` error.

completions.notes: Stale-row reconcile (sweep 2026-06-16). Enforcement mode shipped (Wave 3 03ebfff): capabilities.enforcement 'log'|'block' (settings-store VALID_ENFORCEMENT); block mode throws CAPABILITY_VIOLATION to fail the step. feature.json never reconciled from PLANNED.
